feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to apply a function to fetch data from a user?
entry.content:
1. In Analytic application there is a option to add Filter Line, please find the screenshot attached below.

 

When we click on this filter this below pop up comes

 

 

We want user should visualize in the below format( As visible in all stories). Please find the screenshot attached below.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAC how to get performance form rating data from successfactors.
entry.content:
In SAC, how to get performance form rating data from Success Factors?



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Hello Gurus,Is it possible to have conditional approval process using SAC ?
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

Is it possible to have conditional approval process using SAC ? I know its possible to create calendar composite task using the story scripting, but in that way I need manually to maintain the assignee and reviewers. Is there a way to automate it ?

The scenario is business owner create a project and based on type of project there is approval process. For example if he select type of project as (IT assets) an approval process should take place to IT before going to his head of department. But for other types it shouldn't go to IT.

Thanks.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud License growth
entry.content:
I want to track SAP Analytics Cloud Named License growth Daily.

I checked System>Monitor which has a graph under Historical Usage with types of licenses and count but is very squished as a result change is not visible. Confusing button options as well.

I checked License data model but that does not have date. Other data models I came across focuses only on active users and active content.

Any suggestions , please? I want to track licenses (users may be active or inactive but Not deactivated) count change over time (daily). This is to understand 

1. what is the rate of growth of user licenses (all types segregated so to understand type wise growth).

2. Answer no.1 should answer our general order capacity for extension of license count and generally when we should order to ensure enough capacity?

Regards,

Ratish

entry.title: How to create a custom report to analysis the license usage in SAC?
entry.content:
Now only Named user license is available in SAC. How we can anlysis the usage of these licesnse consumed in SAC instead of standard or custom report?

Any Standard data model we can use to create a report?

entry.title: SAC - Use a value from another table/datasource in calculations (Excel Cell reference in formulas)
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I've got the requirement to calculate a "revenue per" figure where the base for the calculation comes from a totally different datasource. In excel you simply reference the cell with the base value.
But how to achieve this in SAC? Any ideas? 

Thanks and best regards
Axel

entry.title: Currency Conversion: Different Booking Date for different Account Elements
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am using a New Model with an Account Dimension, one Measure and one calculated Measure. In the Account Dimension, I am using two key figures, for one of them I have to use the booking date as the reference, for the other one I am using Booking date + 1 month.

It is possible to realize this with 2 converted measures, one for each key figure. But this leads to problems in the table in the story, if I want to show both key figures in one table.

I want to display it like this:

 Converted Measure
Key figure 112
Key figure 210

But currently, it looks like this:

 Converted Measure 1Converted Measure 2
Key figure 11213
Key figure 2910

So my question is whether it is possible to make adjustments to a single Account Element? Or is there a different workaround?

Thanks you!

Kind regards,
Eric

entry.title: advanced formula step for calculation of dynamic measures
entry.content:
I need to write advanced formula step for calculation of dynamic measures. We take useful life as counter input for FOR loop, then we do a calculation. But while writing back it should create columns(calculated measure) dynamically based on the counter.

FOREACH [d/Asset]
@Life = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="UsefulLife")
FOR @counter = 1 TO @Life
DATA([d/Measures] = "Depreciation",[d/Asset]=[d/Asset]) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="TotalCost")/RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="UsefulLife")
ENDFOR
ENDFOR

I get the following output.

But I need the following output for the column based on useful life.

entry.title: Dropdowns should not overlap the filter panel.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am writing to seek assistance regarding an issue I have encountered with the SAP Analytics Designer template. Specifically, in the template, there is a filter panel that appears upon clicking the filter icon. However, a dropdown is presented beside the filter icon, it overlaps with the filter panel. This presents a usability challenge, and I am seeking guidance on how to ensure that upon selecting the dropdown, the filter panel either closes automatically or remains hidden to prevent overlap.

Thanks!

entry.title: An error could come up execution due to currency difference between the source and target version
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am now facing the error in currency difference issue even though I set up in currency conversion table. This following error is generate in Line number 15 and 17 when I validate the script in Data Action of "Copy Actual to Plan Data". Additionally, I traced those lines and data cannot be generated for both Plan and Actual. Please kindly provide an advice and I would like to know which configuration steps are still left to develop.

Model: SAP_FI_FPA_IM_S4FinancialPlan

Data Action : SAP_FI_FPA_IM_S4FinancialPlan_Admin2 

Plan tracing ran but Data not showed.

Actual tracing couldn't be run.

 

 

Thanks in advance.

Phoo

entry.title: Sap Analytics Cloud check storage usage and availability
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to find out what is the total amount of memory available on my Sap Analytics Cloud tenant in MB or GB, and the currently used storage  for all the objects, models and stories.

In the System Overview tab I cannot find this information.

Do you have any suggestion?

Many thanks,

Best Regards.

Filomena

entry.title: Need example for DATA.APPEND for creating new records
entry.content: I need examples for DATA.APPEND which is used for creating new records in SAC - Data Action Advanced formulas. Need for creating new measures.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Inverse Formula Behaviour
entry.content:
Hi friends,

I'm currently utilizing an inverse formula to determine the sales price based on gross sales and sales volume.

When I adjust the price, the gross sales are appropriately recalculated. This works well.

Similarly, when I modify the gross sales, the price adjusts accordingly. This is also functioning correctly.

However, when I alter the sales volume, it adjusts the price instead of the desired adjustment in gross sales. Is there a method to achieve this without resorting to the "Lock Cell" feature, perhaps through a default setting?

 

 Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: Inter-company Process without Sales & Distribution Module
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

Product: SAP S/4HANA Public CLoud 2402 Version.

Business Requirement: They want to perform Inter-company process without Sales & Distribution Module. How we are going to achieve this. Can anyone help us how we are going to perform this in SAP S/4HANA Public cloud instance along with Inventory accounting details + Invoice accounting details.

Thank you in advance!

Regards,

Kundan

SAP Analytics Cloud @saph4publiccloud @Sap

entry.title: ODN- Reference number Not coming
entry.content:
Dear Expertise, 

We have implemented ODN for plant wise different number range for normal invoice and delivery challan but while doing delivery challan(same state and GST and billing type - F8) ODN reference number is not triggering. 

Kindly have this review and provide us possible missing configuration and step to be configured. 

This is completely S4hana public cloud edition. 

Kindly refer to attached screen shot.

 

Thanks and Regards

Prabhat Kumar

entry.title: Sap Analytics Cloud - Input a Date Parameter into a Data Action to assign a value to a measure
entry.content:
Hi SAP community,  

I want a data action to be trigged when I assign hours to an employee. 

In this case I want to assign hours worked by an employee to a measure "AssignHours" on a date chosen by the user. 

This is the data action code: 

The Data is in the format YYYY-MM-DD and the parameter input is a string. 

When I replace MEMBERSET [d/Date] = %Date% with MEMBERSET [d/Date] = "2024-01-01" (meaning hard code the date), it works and assigned the hours to the measure. 

However, as I am calling the data action in a responsive story page, when I hard code this into the pulled parameter shown below it does not assign the hours to the measure. 

Even though the parameters are accepted by the Data Action (no issues detected in Data Action Monitor), the data action fails to trigger and gives the following error:
There are validation errors in the data action when trying to run it on version "Actual" 

Can you assist with issue I am having.

entry.title: Direct filters with linked dimensions on date vs calendar week
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have two import models in the SAC with linked dimensions. One of the linked dimensions is the date. But in the story we have set the date-filter on calendar week and not the specific date in day granularity as we want to have a look at whole calendar weeks.

So what I am wondering now is: What does the SAC do in the background?

=> When I am filtering in the primary model on a certain calendar week with the calendar week filter in the story all data is being selected with a date within the selected calendar week. That is clear and easy to understand.

=> ...but how  does the direct filter via the linked dimension select on the secondary model and its date dimension in detail? Will the selction of the whole calendar week on the primary model be forwarded to the secondary model? Or will it just be the dates on day granularity found in the primary model that will be forwarded to the secondary model?

For example:
When I would select on calendar week 18 in 20024 and I only have data in there for Monday and Tuesday ( 2024/04/29 and 2024/04/30) but in the secondary model is data for each day of the week, will the secondary model just be filtered with 2024/04/29 and 2024/04/30 (and the data of 2024/05/01, ... 2024/05/05 will be missing) or will it be filtered with all days / dates of calendar week 18.2024?

Thanks a lot!
Martin

entry.title: How to transform a date into calendar week in SAC within the model data in wrangling
entry.content:
Hello SAC-Community,

I am thinking of how to be able to join two import data sources into one SAC model. One of the join criterias would be the calendar week.

So I would import the data with dates from the first data source (SQL database) and then add data from a BW on HANA, where I already have a field with calendar week and year.

Therefore I would have to tranform the date from the imported SQL-data into the calendar week. But how can I achieve this? I did not find a function for this in the SAC wrangling environment. Has there anybody an idea?

(...and the calendar week that is in the date dimension for filtering does not seem to be available for joining two data sources in the data warangling environment)

Thanks a lot and best regards,
Martin

entry.title: How to Auto fill Planning Columns in SAP SAC
entry.content:
Dear Members ,

I am working on FTE planning and the Planning is done Month wise . My measure is FTE .

I have been asked to auto fill the FTE coming from HR Master Data for each employee into these forecasted months by default .

Example if employee 1 FTE is 0.5 then copy this value to Forecast from JAN-DEC planning columns.

Please Help .

 

Thanks,

Zeba

entry.title: Input Control Changing Font Size
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need change the font size in input control member selection.

I try to CSS for this case. It works for Header Title and Subtitle but not work in selection. Is there a solution for this?
